title: Village Healthcare
description: A mod that allows clerics and blacksmiths to heal injured villagers and iron golems.
body:
# Village Healthcare 🩹 A mod that allows clerics and blacksmiths to heal injured villagers and iron golems. ## Healing injured villager ![Cleric healing injured villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/j23NprwL/images/0145bf8e8e27fa93f80884c318b01df121845b0b.gif) ## Repairing Iron Golem ![Blacksmith healing iron golem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/j23NprwL/images/092491699b1494148c0565ec69f247625611a361.gif)
